title: 7 Top Tech Stocks to Buy Heading Into Q4 2022
text: If you love tech stocks, this hasn't been your year. But that doesn't mean you shouldn't be looking at the top tech stocks to buy for the fourth quarter.

title: Add These 4 GARP Stocks to Your Portfolio for Maximum Returns
text: The GARP strategy helps investors gain exposure to stocks that have impressive prospects and are trading at a discount. GWW, CSL, CDW and ADP are some stocks that hold promise.

title: Automatic Data Processing: A Better Opportunity Will Likely Present Itself
text: ADP is a Dividend Champion with 47 consecutive years of dividend growth. Shares currently yield 1.81%. ADP's reach is wide ranging with client count up to 990k and support across 140 countries.

title: Three Dividend Aristocrat Stocks for Investors to Consider
text: A look at three dividend Aristocrats that also have good growth prospects, most notably in rising earnings estimates.

title: G vs. ADP: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
text: G vs. ADP: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?

title: ADP Shares Gain 20.4% in The Past Year: What's Aiding It?
text: A strong business model, recurrent revenues and healthy margins boost the ADP stock.

title: 3 Dividend Kings for Income Investors to Count On
text: It can be tricky to choose the best dividend kings for income investors. These companies have proven their ability to survive and thrive through good times and bad, making them an excellent choice for income investors looking for safety and stability.

title: Adjusting Your Trading Strategy During Volatile Markets
text: Traders who are able to adapt their strategies to the volatility can still reap substantial profits.
